final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing infographic for a technical tutorial on deploying Hermes in a Docker container and integrating with GLMCodingPlan, presented in clear numbered steps.

Style/medium: flat vector infographic, technical documentation style, clean diagrammatic layout with numbered step blocks
Composition: vertical scroll layout with 4 distinct numbered sections (1-2-3-4), each containing a visual diagram and brief annotation
Subject: Docker container deployment workflow — Hermes service setup, containerization, GLMCodingPlan integration, and verification steps
Scene/backdrop: clean white or light gray background with subtle grid lines, code snippets as decorative elements
Text (verbatim): "1" "2" "3" "4" "hermes" "glmcodingplan" "docker"
Constraints: each step must be visually distinct with clear numbering; diagrams must illustrate container and service relationships; text must be legible at small sizes; no copyrighted logos
Avoid: photorealistic 3D renders; cluttered layouts; missing step numbers; generic stock illustrations; Behance trendy flat style
